name: saga_nodes_calm
description: Four calm, minimal level-map node tiles, one family: CURRENT — softly glowing teal rounded-square tile with a thin gold rim; DEFAULT — plain cream rounded-square tile with a thin gold rim; LOCKED — the cream tile with one small simple gold padlock resting on its lower edge; COMPLETE — the cream tile with one modest gold star in the center.
prompt_extra: restrained and clean, thin rims, no carved ornament, no laurels, no crowns, no chains; tile faces stay empty (numbers render on top); identical geometry in all four cells; solid closed silhouettes
